debug_info.goal:
C : Type
inst✝¹ : Category.{0, 0} C
K : Type
inst✝ : DivisionRing K
M : CategoryTheory.Functor C (ModuleCat K)
D : @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M
B : (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) → N ∈ D → Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)
hB : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), N = sSup (B N hN)
hB' : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), sSupIndep (B N hN)
hB'' : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), ⊥ ∉ B N hN
H : ∃ N, ∃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN ≠ {N}
⊢ @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition.refinement C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M D B hB hB' hB'' < D

proof:
by
  refine lt_iff_le_and_ne.mpr ⟨refinement_le B hB hB' hB'', fun h_eq ↦ ?_⟩
  rcases H with ⟨N, hN, hne⟩
  apply hne
  have h_sub : B N hN ⊆ {N} := by
    intro P hP
    have hP_in_D : P ∈ D := by
      have : P ∈ (refinement B hB hB' hB'').carrier := Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨N, Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨hN, hP⟩⟩
      rwa [h_eq] at this
    have hP_le_N : P ≤ N := hB N hN ▸ le_sSup hP
    exact (congr_arg Subtype.val (UniqueGE D D ⟨P, hP_in_D⟩ ⟨N, hN⟩ ⟨P, hP_in_D⟩ ⟨hP_le_N, le_rfl⟩)).symm
  have h_nonempty : (B N hN).Nonempty := by
    by_contra h_emp
    have : N = ⊥ := by rw [hB N hN, Set.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty.mp h_emp, sSup_empty]
    exact D.not_bot_mem (this ▸ hN)
  exact h_nonempty.subset_singleton_iff.mp h_sub
failed_attempts:
by
  refine (refinement_le B hB hB' hB'').lt_of_ne fun h_eq ↦ ?_
  rcases H with ⟨N, hN, h_ne⟩
  apply h_ne
  have h_sub x hx : x ∈ D := h_eq ▸ (by simp [refinement]; exact ⟨N, hN, hx⟩)
  have h_all x hx : x = N :=
    Subtype.ext_iff.mp (UniqueGE D D ⟨x, h_sub x hx⟩ ⟨x, h_sub x hx⟩ ⟨N, hN⟩ ⟨le_rfl, (hB N hN).symm ▸ le_sSup hx⟩)
  apply Set.eq_singleton_iff_unique_mem.mpr
  refine ⟨h_all, ?_⟩
  obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ : (B N hN).Nonempty := by
    by_contra h_mt
    have : N = ⊥ := by rw [hB N hN, Set.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty.mp h_mt, sSup_empty]
    exact D.not_bot_mem (this ▸ hN)
  rwa [h_all x hx] at hx

by
  refine lt_of_le_of_ne (refinement_le B hB hB' hB'') (fun h_eq ↦ ?_)
  rcases H with ⟨N, hN, h_ne⟩
  apply h_ne
  have h_sub : B N hN ⊆ D := fun x hx ↦
    h_eq ▸ (Set.mem_iUnion_of_mem N (Set.mem_iUnion_of_mem hN hx) : x ∈ refinement B hB hB' hB'')
  have h_all : ∀ x ∈ B N hN, x = N := fun x hx ↦ by_contra (fun h ↦
    hB'' N hN (((D.sSupIndep x (h_sub hx)).eq_bot_of_le
      (le_trans ((hB N hN).symm ▸ le_sSup hx) (le_sSup (Set.mem_diff_of_mem hN h.symm)))) ▸ hx))
  have h_mem : N ∈ B N hN := by
    have h_none : (B N hN).Nonempty := by
      by_contra h_mt
      have : N = ⊥ := by rw [hB N hN, Set.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty.mp h_mt, sSup_empty]
      exact D.not_bot_mem (this ▸ hN)
    rcases h_none with ⟨x, hx⟩
    rwa [h_all x hx] at hx
  exact Set.eq_singleton_iff_unique_mem.mpr ⟨h_mem, h_all⟩

sSup (D.carrier \ {N}) := le_inf hx_le (le_sSup (Set.mem_diff_singleton.mpr ⟨hx_D, hxn⟩))
      exact hB'' N hN (le_bot_iff.mp (this.trans (disjoint_iff_inf_le.mp (D.sSupIndep N hN))) ▸ hx)
    have h_ne : (B N hN).Nonempty := by
      by_contra h_empty
      exact D.not_bot_mem (hB N hN ▸ (Set.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty.mp h_empty) ▸ sSup_empty ▸ hN)
    rcases h_ne with ⟨x, hx⟩
    exact Set.eq_singleton_iff_unique_mem.mpr ⟨h_all x hx ▸ hx, h_all⟩⟩

by
  refine ⟨refinement_le B hB hB' hB'', fun h ↦ ?_⟩
  rcases H with ⟨N, hN, h_ne⟩
  have h_car : (refinement B hB hB' hB'').carrier = D.carrier := congr_arg carrier h
  have h_sub : B N hN ⊆ D := fun P hP ↦ h_car ▸ Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨N, Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨hN, hP⟩⟩
  have h_eq : ∀ P ∈ B N hN, P = N := fun P hP ↦
    (UniqueGE D D ⟨P, h_sub hP⟩ ⟨N, hN⟩ ⟨P, h_sub hP⟩ ⟨(hB N hN).symm ▸ le_sSup hP, le_rfl⟩).val.symm
  apply h_ne
  apply Set.eq_singleton_iff_unique_mem.mpr
  constructor
  · rcases sSup_ne_bot.mp (hB N hN ▸ fun h_bot ↦ D.not_bot_mem (h_bot ▸ hN)) with ⟨P, hP, _⟩
    rwa [h_eq P hP] at hP
  · exact h_eq

by
  refine ⟨refinement_le B hB hB' hB'', fun h ↦ ?_⟩
  rcases H with ⟨N, hN, hne⟩
  apply hne
  have h_sub : B N hN ⊆ D := fun x hx ↦ h ▸ (Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨N, Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨hN, hx⟩⟩)
  have h_nonempty : (B N hN).Nonempty := by
    by_contra h_empty
    have : N = ⊥ := (hB N hN).trans (Set.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty.mp h_empty ▸ sSup_empty)
    exact D.not_bot_mem (this ▸ hN)
  exact h_nonempty.subset_singleton_iff.mp (fun x hx ↦ by
    by_contra h_x_ne_N
    have h_disj : Disjoint x N := (sSupIndep_pair h_x_ne_N).mp
      (D.sSupIndep.mono (Set.insert_subset (h_sub hx) (Set.singleton_subset_iff.mpr hN)))
    have : x = ⊥ := disjoint_iff_inf_le.mp h_disj (le_inf ((hB N hN).symm ▸ le_sSup hx) le_rfl)
    exact hB'' N hN (this ▸ hx))

by
  refine lt_of_le_of_ne (refinement_le B hB hB' hB'') (fun h => ?_)
  rcases H with ⟨N, hN, hne⟩
  apply hne
  have h_single : ∀ S ∈ B N hN, S = N := fun S hS => by
    have hS_in_D : S ∈ D := h ▸ (Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨N, Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨hN, hS⟩⟩)
    by_contra h_sne
    have h_disj : Disjoint S N := (D.sSupIndep S hS_in_D).mono_right (le_sSup ⟨hN, h_sne.symm⟩)
    have : S = ⊥ := h_disj.eq_bot_of_le ((hB N hN).symm ▸ le_sSup hS)
    exact hB'' N hN (this ▸ hS)
  have h_ne_emp : (B N hN).Nonempty := by
    by_contra h_emp
    have : N = ⊥ := by rw [hB N hN, Set.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty.mp h_emp, sSup_empty]
    exact D.not_bot_mem (this ▸ hN)
  have h_N_in : N ∈ B N hN := by
    rcases h_ne_emp with ⟨S, hS⟩
    rwa [h_single S hS] at hS
  exact Set.eq_singleton_iff_unique_mem.mpr ⟨h_N_in, h_single⟩

by
  refine ⟨refinement_le B hB hB' hB'', fun h_ref => ?_⟩
  rcases H with ⟨N, hN, h_ne⟩
  apply h_ne
  have h_sub : B N hN ⊆ {N} := by
    intro N' hN'
    rcases h_ref (Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨N, Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨hN, hN'⟩⟩) with ⟨S, hS, rfl⟩
    have hSN : S ⊆ {N} := fun s hs => by
      by_contra h
      have h_disj : Disjoint s N := (sSupIndep_pair h).mp (D.sSupIndep.mono (Set.insert_subset (hS hs) (Set.singleton_subset_iff.mpr hN)))
      exact D.not_bot_mem (h_disj.eq_bot_of_le ((le_sSup hs).trans (hB N hN ▸ le_sSup hN')) ▸ hS hs)
    rcases S.eq_empty_or_nonempty with hS_mt | hS_ne
    · rw [hS_mt, sSup_empty] at hN'; exact hB'' N hN hN'
    · rcases hS_ne with ⟨s, hs⟩
      rwa [Set.subset_antisymm hSN (Set.singleton_subset_iff.mpr (hSN hs ▸ hs)), sSup_singleton]
  have h_B_ne : (B N hN).Nonempty := by
    by_contra h_mt
    have : N = ⊥ := by rw [hB N hN, Set.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty.mp h_mt, sSup_empty]
    exact D.not_bot_mem (this ▸ hN)
  rcases h_B_ne with ⟨N', hN'⟩
  exact Set.eq_singleton_iff_unique_mem.mpr ⟨h_sub hN' ▸ hN', fun x hx => h_sub hx⟩

by
  refine lt_of_le_of_ne (refinement_le B hB hB' hB'') (fun h ↦ ?_)
  rcases H with ⟨N, hN, h_ne⟩
  have h_sub : B N hN ⊆ D.carrier := by
    intro x hx; have : x ∈ (refinement B hB hB' hB'').carrier := by
      simp [refinement]; exact ⟨N, hN, hx⟩
    rwa [h] at this
  apply h_ne
  have h_all : ∀ x ∈ B N hN, x = N := by
    intro x hx
    have hxD : x ∈ D := h_sub hx
    have hxleN : x ≤ N := (hB N hN).symm ▸ le_sSup hx
    by_contra hnx
    have h_disj : Disjoint x N := (sSupIndep_pair hnx).mp (D.sSupIndep.mono (by simp [hxD, hN]))
    have hxbot : x = ⊥ := le_bot_iff.mp (le_trans (le_inf le_rfl hxleN) (disjoint_iff_inf_le.mp h_disj))
    exact D.not_bot_mem (hxbot ▸ hxD)
  apply Set.Subset.antisymm
  · intro x hx; exact Set.mem_singleton_iff.mpr (h_all x hx)
  · intro x hx; rw [Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hx; subst x
    have h_non : (B N hN).Nonempty := by
      by_contra h_empty
      have hNbot : N = ⊥ := by rw [hB N hN, Set.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty.mp h_empty, sSup_empty]
      exact D.not_bot_mem (hNbot ▸ hN)
    rcases h_non with ⟨y, hy⟩; rwa [h_all y hy] at hy

by
  refine lt_of_le_of_ne (refinement_le B hB hB' hB'') (fun h_eq => ?_)
  rcases H with ⟨N, hN, hB_ne⟩
  have h_sub : B N hN ⊆ D.carrier := by
    intro x hx
    have : x ∈ (refinement B hB hB' hB'').carrier := by
      simp only [refinement, Set.mem_iUnion]
      exact ⟨N, hN, hx⟩
    rwa [h_eq] at this
  have h_eq_N : ∀ x ∈ B N hN, x = N := by
    intro x hx
    have x_in_D : x ∈ D := h_sub hx
    have x_le_N : x ≤ N := hB N hN ▸ le_sSup hx
    by_contra h_ne
    have h_disj : Disjoint x N := (sSupIndep_pair h_ne).mp (D.sSupIndep.mono (by
      intro z hz
      rcases hz with (rfl | rfl)
      · exact x_in_D
      · exact hN))
    have : x = ⊥ := le_bot_iff.mp (h_disj.le_bot_of_le x_le_N)
    exact hB'' N hN (this ▸ hx)
  have h_nonempty : (B N hN).Nonempty := by
    by_contra h_emp
    have : N = ⊥ := (hB N hN).trans (congr_arg sSup (Set.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty.mp h_emp))
    exact D.not_bot_mem (this ▸ hN)
  rcases h_nonempty with ⟨y, hy⟩
  have : y = N := h_eq_N y hy
  have : N ∈ B N hN := this ▸ hy
  exact hB_ne (Set.eq_singleton_iff_unique_mem.mpr ⟨this, h_eq_N⟩)

by
  refine lt_of_le_of_ne (refinement_le B hB hB' hB'') ?_
  intro h_eq
  rcases H with ⟨N, hN, hB_ne⟩
  have hN_mem_ref : N ∈ refinement B hB hB' hB'' := h_eq.symm ▸ hN
  rcases hN_mem_ref with ⟨N₀, hN₀, h_mem⟩
  have h_eq_N : N = N₀ := D.sSupIndep.eq_of_le hN hN₀ (hB N₀ hN₀ ▸ le_sSup h_mem) (fun h ↦ D.not_bot_mem (h ▸ hN))
  subst h_eq_N
  apply hB_ne
  rw [Set.eq_singleton_iff_unique_mem]
  refine ⟨h_mem, fun x hx ↦ ?_⟩
  by_contra hne
  have h_disj := (sSupIndep_pair hne).mp ((hB' N hN).mono (by simp [hx, h_mem]))
  exact hB'' N hN (le_bot_iff.mp (h_disj.le_bot_of_le (hB N hN ▸ le_sSup hx)) ▸ hx)

by
  refine lt_iff_le_and_ne.mpr ⟨refinement_le B hB hB' hB'', fun h ↦ ?_⟩
  rcases H with ⟨N, hN, hB_ne⟩
  have h_subset : B N hN ⊆ D.carrier := fun x hx ↦ by
    have : x ∈ (refinement B hB hB' hB'').carrier := by simp [refinement]; exact ⟨N, hN, hx⟩
    rwa [h] at this
  have h_all_N : ∀ x ∈ B N hN, x = N := fun x hx ↦
    (UniqueGE D D ⟨x, h_subset hx⟩ ⟨x, h_subset hx⟩ ⟨N, hN⟩ ⟨le_rfl, (hB N hN).symm ▸ le_sSup hx⟩).congr_arg Subtype.val
  apply hB_ne
  have h_nonempty : (B N hN).Nonempty := by
    by_contra h_emp
    exact D.not_bot_mem (hB N hN ▸ (Set.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty.mp h_emp ▸ sSup_empty) ▸ hN)
  obtain ⟨y, hy⟩ := h_nonempty
  have hN_in : N ∈ B N hN := h_all_N y hy ▸ hy
  exact Set.ext fun x ↦ ⟨fun hx ↦ Set.mem_singleton_iff.mpr (h_all_N x hx), fun hx ↦ (Set.mem_singleton_iff.mp hx).symm ▸ hN_in⟩

by
  refine lt_iff_le_and_ne.mpr ⟨refinement_le B hB hB' hB'', fun h_eq ↦ ?_⟩
  rcases H with ⟨N, hN, h_ne⟩
  apply h_ne
  have h_sub : B N hN ⊆ D := fun x hx ↦ h_eq ▸ Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨N, Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨hN, hx⟩⟩
  have h_subset : B N hN ⊆ {N} := fun x hx ↦
    have hx_in_D : x ∈ D := h_sub hx
    Subtype.ext_iff.mp (UniqueGE D D ⟨x, hx_in_D⟩ ⟨N, hN⟩ ⟨x, hx_in_D⟩ ⟨(hB N hN).symm ▸ le_sSup hx, le_rfl⟩).symm
  have h_nonempty : (B N hN).Nonempty := by
    by_contra h_emp
    have : N = ⊥ := hB N hN ▸ Set.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty.mp h_emp ▸ sSup_empty
    exact D.not_bot_mem (this ▸ hN)
  exact h_nonempty.subset_singleton_iff.mp h_subset

by
  refine ⟨refinement_le B hB hB' hB'', fun h_eq ↦ ?_⟩
  rcases H with ⟨N, hN, h_ne⟩
  apply h_ne
  have h_subset : B N hN ⊆ D := by
    rw [← congr_arg carrier h_eq]
    exact Set.subset_iUnion₂ N hN
  have h_B_sub_N : B N hN ⊆ {N} := by
    intro x hx
    have hx_le_N : x ≤ N := (hB N hN).symm ▸ le_sSup hx
    by_contra hx_ne_N
    have : x = ⊥ := le_bot_iff.mp <| (le_inf hx_le_N (le_sSup ⟨h_subset hx, hx_ne_N⟩)).trans
      (D.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup_right hN).le_bot
    exact hB'' N hN (this ▸ hx)
  have h_B_ne : (B N hN).Nonempty := by
    by_contra h_empty
    have : N = ⊥ := by rw [hB N hN, Set.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty.mp h_empty, sSup_empty]
    exact D.not_bot_mem (this ▸ hN)
  rcases h_B_ne with ⟨x, hx⟩
  exact Set.Subset.antisymm h_B_sub_N (Set.singleton_subset_iff.mpr (h_B_sub_N hx ▸ hx))

by
  refine ⟨refinement_le B hB hB' hB'', fun h_le ↦ ?_⟩
  rcases H with ⟨N, hN, h_ne⟩
  have h_all_N : ∀ x ∈ B N hN, x = N := fun x hx ↦ by
    have hx_ref : x ∈ refinement B hB hB' hB'' := by simp [refinement]; exact ⟨N, hN, hx⟩
    rcases h_le hx_ref with ⟨S, hS, hxS⟩
    have h_S_sub : S ⊆ {N} := fun y hy ↦ by
      have h_y_le_N : y ≤ N := (le_sSup hy).trans (hxS.symm ▸ (hB N hN).symm ▸ le_sSup hx)
      by_contra h_neq
      have h_disj : Disjoint y N := (sSupIndep_pair h_neq).mp (D.sSupIndep.mono fun z hz ↦ by
        rcases hz with (rfl | rfl); exact hS hy; exact hN)
      exact D.not_bot_mem (le_bot_iff.mp (disjoint_iff_inf_le.mp h_disj (le_inf le_rfl h_y_le_N)) ▸ hS hy)
    have h_S_ne : S ≠ ∅ := fun h_empty ↦ hB'' N hN (by rw [hxS, h_empty, sSup_empty]; exact hx)
    rw [Set.subset_singleton_iff_eq.mp h_S_sub |> (·.resolve_left h_S_ne), sSup_singleton] at hxS
    exact hxS
  exact h_ne <| Set.eq_singleton_iff_nonempty_unique_mem.mpr ⟨(by
    by_contra h_empty
    have h_N_bot : N = ⊥ := by rw [hB N hN, h_empty, sSup_empty]
    exact D.not_bot_mem (h_N_bot ▸ hN)), h_all_N⟩

by
  refine lt_of_le_of_ne (refinement_le B hB hB' hB'') ?_
  intro h
  rcases H with ⟨N, hN, hB_ne⟩
  have : B N hN = {N} := by
    apply Set.eq_singleton_iff_nonempty_unique_mem.mpr
    constructor
    · rw [Set.nonempty_iff_ne_empty]
      intro h_empty
      have : N = ⊥ := by rw [hB N hN, h_empty, sSup_empty]
      exact D.not_bot_mem (this ▸ hN)
    · intro x hx
      have hxD : x ∈ D := h ▸ Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨N, Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨hN, hx⟩⟩
      have hx_le_N : x ≤ N := by rw [hB N hN]; exact le_sSup hx
      by_contra h_neq
      have h_disj : Disjoint x N := (sSupIndep_pair h_neq).mp (D.sSupIndep.mono (Set.insert_subset hxD (Set.singleton_subset_iff.mpr hN)))
      exact hB'' N hN (le_bot_iff.mp (h_disj.le_bot_of_le le_rfl hx_le_N) ▸ hx)
  exact hB_ne this

by
  refine (refinement_le B hB hB' hB'').lt_of_ne ?_
  intro h_eq
  rcases H with ⟨N, hN, hB_ne⟩
  apply hB_ne
  have h_carrier : SetLike.coe (refinement B hB hB' hB'') = SetLike.coe D := congr_arg SetLike.coe h_eq
  apply Set.Subset.antisymm
  · intro x hx
    have hxD : x ∈ D := h_carrier ▸ Set.mem_iUnion.2 ⟨N, Set.mem_iUnion.2 ⟨hN, hx⟩⟩
    have hxleN : x ≤ N := hB N hN ▸ le_sSup hx
    exact congr_arg Subtype.val (UniqueGE D D ⟨x, hxD⟩ ⟨N, hN⟩ ⟨x, hxD⟩ ⟨hxleN, le_rfl⟩).symm
  · intro x hx
    obtain rfl : x = N := hx
    have ⟨y, hy⟩ : (B N hN).Nonempty := by
      by_contra h_emp
      have : N = ⊥ := hB N hN ▸ (Set.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty.mp h_emp) ▸ sSup_empty
      exact D.not_bot_mem (this ▸ hN)
    have h_yD : y ∈ D := h_carrier ▸ Set.mem_iUnion.2 ⟨N, Set.mem_iUnion.2 ⟨hN, hy⟩⟩
    have hyleN : y ≤ N := hB N hN ▸ le_sSup hy
    rwa [congr_arg Subtype.val (UniqueGE D D ⟨y, h_yD⟩ ⟨N, hN⟩ ⟨y, h_yD⟩ ⟨hyleN, le_rfl⟩).symm] at hy

by
  refine lt_of_le_of_ne (refinement_le B hB hB' hB'') ?_
  intro h_eq
  rcases H with ⟨N, hN, h_ne⟩
  have h_carrier : (refinement B hB hB' hB'').carrier = D.carrier := congr_arg carrier h_eq
  have h_sub : B N hN ⊆ D.carrier := by
    intro K hK
    have : K ∈ (refinement B hB hB' hB'').carrier :=
      Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨N, Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨hN, hK⟩⟩
    rwa [h_carrier] at this
  have h_subset : B N hN ⊆ {N} := by
    intro K hK
    have hK_D : K ∈ D := h_sub hK
    rw [Set.mem_singleton_iff]
    by_contra h_ne_KN
    have h_disj : Disjoint K (sSup (D.carrier \ {K})) := D.sSupIndep K hK_D
    have h_le_sup : N ≤ sSup (D.carrier \ {K}) := le_sSup (Set.mem_diff_of_mem hN h_ne_KN.symm)
    have h_K_le_N : K ≤ N := (hB N hN).symm ▸ le_sSup hK
